claim: For a 4096x4096 group_size=128 packed uint4 GEMV on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, one-CTA-per-row fused unpack/dequant/reduction measured 5.463959x faster than the one-thread-per-row seed baseline using HIP-event timing only. This is not a claim against a vendor quantized library or inference-engine baseline.
expected_profiler_signals: more parallel K reduction per output row
curation_note: timing-only seed-baseline comparison: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected and no matching hipBLASLt, Composable Kernel, MIGraphX, Triton, vLLM, or framework quantized baseline is attached. Treat as custom-kernel seed evidence, not a broad library win.
